children.value: Show that sine and cosine functions can be expressed in terms of complex exponentials as follows:

children.html: cosϕ=eiϕ+e−iϕ2cos\phi=\frac{e^{i\phi}+e^{-i\phi}}{2}cosϕ=2eiϕ+e−iϕ​
